or Class TokenGotEvent java.lang.Object ptolemy.actor.TokenGotEvent public class TokenGotEvent extends java.lang.Object An event that is published by IOPorts whenever get or getInside is called. The appropriate event should be published whenever a

appropriate event should be published whenever a token is taken out from the port's queue by the actor code. In Kepler the provenance recorder uses these events to save intermediate results of the workflow. In the future these events could be u

workflow. In the future these events could be used for "smart" reruns or a fault tolerance mechanism. Since: Ptolemy II 6.1 Version: $Id: TokenGotEvent.java,v 1.7 2007/12/07 06:24:49 cxh Exp $ Author: Norbert Podhorszki Accepted Rating: Red (pnorb
